calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-28-2010 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-28-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; Not Reported.
Appearances:
Richard Lieberman, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff The Granada Inc., dba The Granada, represented by agent: Tony Davidauskis.
Michael Monagle, Esq., through limited scope, for and with the Defendant(s): Keith Billy.
The Judge Pro Tem James Stanton Bair, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement "Stipulation for Entry of Judgment or Dismissal", which was NOT filed.
Case settled, matter is taken off calendar.
